case.title: WILLIS v. FIRST REAL ESTATE AND INVESTMENT COMPANY

opinion.h1: WILLIS v. FIRST REAL ESTATE AND INVESTMENT COMPANY, 292 U.S. 626 (1934)
opinion.h2: Henry B. WILLIS, petitioner, v. The FIRST REAL ESTATE AND INVESTMENT COMPANY et al.* No. 845.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. Sydney Smith, of El Paso, Tex., for petitioner.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the United States Circuit Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit denied.
* Rehearing denied 292 U.S. 604, 64 S. Ct. 713, 78 L. Ed. --.[ Willis v. First Real Estate and Investment Company 292 U.S. 626 (1934) ]
